ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "campus_number" INTEGER /* Campus number assigned to the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal in charge of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., Elementary, Middle, High) */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment at the school */,
  "teacher_count" INTEGER /* Number of teachers at the school */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" TEXT /* Student-teacher ratio at the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_id") REFERENCES principals ("principal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district office is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district office is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the district office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the district office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the district office */,
  "superintendent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the superintendent in charge of the district */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget for the district */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff members at the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the rating belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the school (e.g., A, B, C, D, F, Not Rated) */,
  "yrs_unacceptable" INTEGER /* Number of years the school has had an unacceptable performance rating */,
  "overall_score" TEXT /* Overall score of the school */,
  "subject_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each subject (e.g., Math, Science, English) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_ratings_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principals" (
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the principal belongs to */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a principal */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the principal (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Ph.D.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_principals_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "superintendents" (
  "superintendent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each superintendent */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the superintendent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the superintendent */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the superintendent belongs to */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a superintendent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the superintendent (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Ph.D.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("superintendent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_superintendents_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement plan */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the plan belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the plan was submitted */,
  "plan_title" TEXT /* Title of the improvement plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the improvement plan */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., Submitted, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who approved the plan */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Specific goals of the plan */,
  "progress_updates" TEXT /* Regular progress updates on the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvement_plans_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the user belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., school, district, plan) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., school, district, plan) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the intervention is applied to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the intervention was applied */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., Tutoring, Curriculum Changes) */,
  "intervention_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., Active, Completed, Planned) */,
  "evaluation_results" TEXT /* Results of the intervention's evaluation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the message was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
